nasb.text: You shall say to them, ‘When you have offered from it the best of it, then the rest shall be reckoned to the Levites as the product of the threshing floor, and as the product of the wine vat.

esv.text: Therefore you shall say to them, ‘When you have offered from it the best of it, then the rest shall be counted to the Levites as produce of the threshing floor, and as produce of the winepress.

cnv.text: 所以你要對利未人說：‘如果你們把最好的獻上，這就算為你們禾場上的糧和榨酒池中的酒了。

ccb.text: “你要告诉利未人，‘你们奉献了最好的以后，其余的算作你们麦场上的五谷和榨酒池的酒，
